$comment: Season dossier pack S08, The Boiling Point (Horsepower War act). Season-scoped coverage for the great duel year: the king and the insurgent at full flame, war metaphors for the title fight, engines at violent maturity, and a circus learning to police itself. Ids are stable rendezvous keys, never rename. Read-side only: editing this file changes display, never replay.

templates.headline: THE BOILING POINT: the king, the insurgent, and a winter's worth of kindling
templates.deck: The duel the grandstand waited a decade for
templates.summary: Season eight opens with the insurgent finally armed with establishment power and the champion refusing to blink.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} For a decade this paddock asked one question: what happens when the backstreet garage gets real thunder under the bodywork. This winter the question was answered with a signature, and the loaded gun is finally loaded. The champion, asked whether the insurgent worried him, simply looked at his own car.
sections.context: Every garage has picked a side and denied it in the same sentence. The war metaphors write themselves this year, and for once the racing promises to deserve them. {pool:paddockBuzz}
sections.close: Sixteen rounds at full flame. The circus waited ten years for this; it can bear sixteen rounds more.

templates.headline: {subject} WINS[[?venue: at {venue}]], a battle won in a season-long war
templates.deck: Full flame, front line, flag first

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} This was not a race, it was an engagement: two camps, one front line, and {subject} holding it when the flag fell. The boiling point forges its winners the way a furnace forges steel, and tonight one garage flies its colours over the whole front. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: {subject} on the podium[[?venue: at {venue}]], the honour of third wheel
templates.deck: Between the titans, somebody stood tallest of the rest

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The titans took the top steps and the headlines, and {subject} took everything left, which today was the whole of the rest of the field. A podium beside two armies is not a consolation; it is a border held. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: POLE for {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]], the front line drawn at full flame
templates.deck: First ground taken before the first corner

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} In a war, ground taken before the battle is worth double. {subject} holds pole[[?venue: at {venue}]], the first yard of the front line, and the other camp has a long night of maps ahead. {pool:swBoard}
sections.close: Pole is a promise. Tomorrow decides whether it was a threat.

templates.headline: {subject} takes the high ground of the boiling point
templates.deck: The summit changes hands at the height of the war
templates.summary: {subject} took the championship lead in season eight.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The big board's top line has a new occupant, and in this season that line is a trench, a throne, and a target all at once. {subject} leads the boiling point, and the other camp is already loading for the reply. {pool:swBoard}
sections.close: Wars are not won by holding the summit for a week. The defence begins at the next flag.

templates.headline: {subject} stops[[?venue: at {venue}]], a bomb with mirrors, defused
templates.deck: Violent maturity collects its maintenance fee

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The men who build these engines call them fully mature, and the men who drive them call them bombs with mirrors. Today the bomb went quiet under {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]] without exploding, which in this season counts as mercy. {pool:wrenchNote}
sections.close: The crew counts what is salvageable. The war cannot afford many Sundays like this one.

templates.headline: {subject} boils over[[?venue: at {venue}]], the limit found at full flame
templates.deck: In the hottest season, tempers and tyres give out together

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Every duel has a corner where the bravest option and the correct option stop being the same thing. {subject} chose brave[[?venue: at {venue}]], and the armco delivered the correction. The driver walked; the other camp noted it down. {pool:swCrowd}
sections.close: The stewards are watching this season harder than any before it. The frights are being counted now.
